purpose: Default seed rules collected from successful L4D2 Steam group-server filter runs.

keywords.label: RPG
keywords.notes: ASCII case-insensitive in DLL; matches RPG/Rpg/rPg.

manual_blocked_connectstrings.reason: XY/Starry Sky public A2S identity family.

auto_derived_hosts.reason: XY/Starry Sky direct family derived from repeated disguised Steam group-server rows.

instant_heuristics.rule: Name == Left 4 Dead 2, official L4D2 map, MaxPlayers > 8
instant_heuristics.purpose: Current-refresh drop for spoofed/default-name entry rows.
Immediate drop for XY-style rows where map field is unavailable early.

instant_heuristics.rule: Name contains Valve Left4Dead 2 Hong Kong Server, official L4D2 map, MaxPlayers > 8
instant_heuristics.purpose: Immediate drop for alternate XY/Starry Sky style.

runtime_policy.old_auto_derived_hosts: Load at DLL startup as next-launch fast path.
runtime_policy.new_auto_derived_hosts: Derive from current Steam group-server item rows and persist only when the host set changes.
runtime_policy.file_write_policy: Write auto-derived config via temp file and atomic replace on a short background thread.
runtime_policy.safety_note: Current-refresh hiding must use instant heuristics or existing config; newly derived hosts mainly strengthen later rows and future launches.
